channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The U.S. Must Expand Its Strategic Petroleum Reserve
item.description: A restored and growing reserve is vital for deterrence, economic stability, and national security.

item.title: America Gains Ground as Iran Faces Severe Setbacks
item.description: With a struggling economy and military, Iran confronts a U.S. foreign policy unconstrained by fear.

item.title: Room for Failure in Space
item.description: Blue Origin's recent rocket explosion should not hinder our forward-looking approach to space exploration.

item.title: A Revolutionary Spirit at Yale
item.description: Exploring the connections between Yale, New Haven, John Trumbull, and the American Revolution.
